Gianti

Peace of mind.
Delivered.

The lifecycle of your cargo with Gianti Logistics begins at the port of Poti or Batumi, where our marine services team coordinates vessel arrival, unloading, and customs clearance efficiently.

Your freight is seamlessly transported to our nearest facility, which is equipped with advanced technology to ensure your product’s integrity.

Your cargo is processed at our Gianti Terminal—a 22,280 sq.m facility in Poti equipped with reach stackers and forklifts—where goods are sorted, stored, and prepared for onward transport.

Cooler boxes and temperature-controlled solutions guarantee that sensitive products maintain their freshness during transit.

Our multimodal transport network moves your cargo efficiently by land, rail, ocean, or air across Georgia, CIS countries, and worldwide.

For oversized and heavy cargo, our project logistics team handles crane operations up to 400 tons, route surveys, and specialized transport to the final destination.

You have full visibility of your shipment through our tracking systems and can reach our offices in Tbilisi, Poti, Baku, Tashkent, Almaty, or Istanbul for support.

Our Services

Marine Services

Gianti Logistics, a leading transport and logistics provider in the Caucasus region, delivers comprehensive solutions with unmatched reliability, regional expertise, and customer satisfaction.

Marine Services

Gianti Terminal

Streamline your logistics with Gianti Logistics’s efficient cross docking, reducing handling and storage costs while accelerating product delivery.

More details

More details
Gianti Terminal

Project Logistics

Gianti Logistics specializes in oversized & heavy lift project logistics with crane service capacity up to 400 tons. We handle route surveys, topographical surveys, and swept path analysis to ensure safe delivery of any cargo.

Project Logistics

Transportation

Gianti Logistics provides multimodal transportation services including land, rail, ocean, and air freight to meet the diverse logistics needs of our clients across Georgia and worldwide:

Transportation

Consulting

Gianti Logistics offers expert consulting services including route surveys, topographical surveys, and swept path analysis. Our experienced engineers provide comprehensive logistics planning for complex cargo movements across challenging terrains.

Consulting

Consulting

Our repacking services are designed to optimize product presentation, enhance shelf appeal, and ensure compliance with specific retail or distribution requirements.

Consulting

Project Logistics

Recognizing the unique challenges posed by transporting perishable goods, particularly in the e-commerce landscape, Gianti Logistics provides innovative solutions to ensure the safe and timely delivery of every cargo.

More details

More details
Project Logistics

Marine Services

Our Blast Freezing service is designed to preserve the integrity, taste, and quality of your perishable products. Using state-of-the-art technology, we rapidly freeze products at extremely low temperatures to ensure that food maintains its nutritional value and texture, meeting the highest standards of safety and freshness.

More details

More details
Marine Services

Customs & Warehousing

Gianti Logistics’s Customs Bonded service provides a seamless solution for managing imported goods under customs control. With our bonded facilities, you can store goods without immediate payment of duties or taxes, ensuring smoother operations and optimized cash flow. Our team of experts works diligently to handle the complexities of customs requirements so you can focus on your business.

More details

More details
Customs & Warehousing

Air Freight

Gianti Logistics provides full marine services including Ship's Agency, Chartering, and Port Services & Stevedoring in the ports of Poti and Batumi. Our experienced team ensures efficient vessel operations, cargo handling, and port logistics for all vessel types and cargo categories.

More details

More details
Air Freight

Our Locations

THE Gianti Logistics Network of Facilities

Strategically positioned at the crossroads of Europe and Asia, our offices in Georgia, Azerbaijan, Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, and Turkey provide comprehensive coverage across key trade corridors.

Talk to us

Transportation Services

Land & Rail

Gianti Logistics’s drayage services provide seamless transportation for your refrigerated and frozen goods between ports and distribution centers. Our expertise in temperature-controlled logistics ensures your products are maintained at the required temperature, preserving their quality and safety during short-haul transfers.

Land & RailLearn more

Transportation Services

Rail Transport

Gianti Logistics provides comprehensive land and rail transportation services across Georgia and CIS countries. Our fleet and rail connections ensure efficient movement of containerized, bulk, and project cargo between ports, terminals, and final destinations.

Rail TransportLearn more

Transportation Services

Ocean Freight

Our ocean and air freight services are designed for businesses needing flexible shipping solutions. Gianti Logistics's global network and experienced freight team ensure your cargo arrives safely and on schedule, whether by sea or air.

Ocean FreightLearn more

About us

MORE THAN JUST LOGISTICS.

Gianti Logistics was founded in Tbilisi, Georgia in 2005. We are a leading transport and logistics provider specializing in the handling and transportation of containerized, heavy lift, and project cargos throughout Georgia, CIS countries, and worldwide. With offices in Tbilisi, Poti, Baku, Tashkent, Almaty, and Istanbul, we deliver comprehensive logistics solutions backed by decades of regional expertise.

About usLearn more

Client’s feedback

Gianti Logistics transformed our cargo operations across the Caucasus. Their team's deep expertise in port logistics and project cargo handling reduced our transit times by 40%25 while maintaining the highest safety standards for our oversized equipment shipments.
